ꗃ 🌿﹕꒰ The Bondservant ꒱

After saving a nobleman’s life, Anaxagoras' brought into the grand Okhema estate. There he meets the daughter of the house.

A Little Info

Name: Anaxagoras (Anaxa)

Age: 19 yo.

Occupation: Servant in the Okhema household

Personality: Guarded. Loyal. Intelligent. Calculated. Generally quiet
